message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker — Browser Edition progress and child task updates

Update .beads/issues.jsonl to reflect progress on the Browser Edition epic
(asupersync-3qv04) and its child tracks. Includes status updates for WASM
crate scaffolding tasks, package topology tasks, ABI contract tasks, and
QA evidence matrix tasks as they advance from open to in-progress or closed.
